limitations: Boundary/coframe coefficients are represented through existing BHSM topographic/profile sectors.
No prediction residual is used to choose a boundary/coframe coefficient.

rows.conclusion: lepton sector supplies a control case with no coframe triplet coefficient
rows.limitation: Control case does not introduce an independent mixed coefficient.

rows.conclusion: up-sector boundary/coframe cross coefficient is represented by V_PSD/profile
rows.limitation: Full profile positivity remains a separate H_T dependency.

rows.conclusion: down-sector boundary/coframe cross coefficient is represented by V_PSD/profile
rows.limitation: Full profile positivity remains a separate H_T dependency.

title: BHSM v2.11 Boundary/Coframe Compatibility Report
